title: bicep-affected configuration
description: Strict configuration for bicep-affected. Omit a property to use its runtime default; provide an empty array to explicitly select no values for that property.

entrypoints.description: Glob patterns classifying deployment entrypoints. Omitted defaults to an empty list; an explicit empty list also classifies none.

helpers.description: Glob patterns classifying helper Bicep files. Omitted defaults to an empty list; an explicit empty list also classifies none.

publishableModules.description: Publishable module rules. Omit to use the default **/*.bicep rule with metadata.json; use [] to disable publishable-module classification.

globalImpactFiles.description: Glob patterns whose changes affect the repository. Omit to use **/bicepconfig.json; use [] to disable this global-impact rule.

metadata.description: Adjacent metadata filename. Omit to use metadata.json.
